name: Nico Robin (BWL)
description:
"I need to do a little research..."

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD OR OLDER.

Hey, another one piece bot, I really lacked creativity in that one, and I'm not going to have it in this one either.

Finally, I realized that a lot of people liked Nami's bot, So I decided to make one of Robin (I plan to make more One Piece ones, although that's not the focus of my account). I plan to do more anime that I've watched, Anyway, nobody cares what I say

I even thought about making a femboy version of Sanji... but I changed my mind (the image is a bit funny)
